channel.title: Counting on CP Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Counting on CP Notes

item.title: Combinatorics #0.1: 计数中常用的结论
item.description: 常见计数结论、Lucas 定理、不定方程解计数、平面分拆、DAG 路径计数、多项式平移、XOR 均匀性与若干竞赛常用结论。

item.title: Combinatorics #1.2: Inclusion-Exclusion, Bounded Diophantine Equations, and Derangements
item.description: A compact note on inclusion-exclusion, bounded integer solutions, equal-cap upper bounds, and classical derangement formulas.
